guide_title: ℹ️ Yadda ake karanta wadannan jadawali
guide_body:
• Dige / sanduna: darajar kowace shekara daya.
  • Lankwasa mai kauri mai launi: mai santsa na LOESS: yanayin gida, mai 'yancin lankwasa, don ka ga yadda gudun ke canzawa cikin lokaci (misali dumamar yanayi na kara sauri bayan ~1985).
  • Layin dige-dige: madaidaicin yanayi mai karfi (Theil-Sen); gangarowarsa ita ce lambar “kowace shekaru goma” a bayanin.
  • p<0.05 / b.m.: mahimmancin Mann-Kendall: ko yanayin gaskiya ne a kididdiga ko kuma kawai hayaniya (b.m. = ba mai mahimmanci ba). Zafi yawanci yana da matukar mahimmanci; ruwan sama sau da yawa ba haka bane.
  • Bandin inuwa: cikakken tsawon tarihi a duk shekaru na wannan watan.
  • Launukan taswirar zafi: zafi (shudi sanyi → ja zafi); karanta layi daga kasa zuwa sama don ganin yadda wannan watan ke canzawa cikin shekaru.
threshold_title: Kwanakin zafi da sanyi mai tsanani kowace shekara, {name}
vs_full: idan aka kwatanta da matsakaicin dukan lokaci ({base:.1f} °C)
heatmap_title: Matsakaicin zafi na wata-wata bisa shekara, {name}
anom_heatmap_title: Bambancin wata-wata idan aka kwatanta da {base}, {name}
subtitle: {start}-{end} · kwanaki {days} · mafi zafi {wy} ({wv:.1f} °C), mafi sanyi {cy} ({cv:.1f} °C)
analog_line: Nan da 2050, yanayin nan na iya jin kamar yadda {analog} yake a yau, kusan +{d} °C mai zafi.
analog_past: A 1940, yanayin nan ya kasance kamar yadda {analog} yake a yau, kusan {d} °C mai sanyi.
cap_yearly: Matsakaicin shekara tare da mai santsa na LOESS (yana nuna karin gudu) da yanayin Theil-Sen mai karfi + mahimmanci
cap_anomalies: Kowace shekara idan aka kwatanta da matsakaicin 1961-1990: sandunan ja sun fi zafi, shudi sun fi sanyi. Sauyi daga mafi yawan shudi zuwa mafi yawan ja shine dumamar yanayi.
cap_heatmap: Matsakaicin kowane wata na kowace shekara a matsayin gidan launi (bandunan 2 °C). Karanta layi zuwa sama don ganin yadda wannan watan ke dumama cikin shekaru goma-goma.
cap_anom_heatmap: Gidan iri daya, amma ana auna kowane wata da nasa daidaiton 1961-1990, don haka canji kadai ke bayyana (ja ya fi zafi fiye da yadda aka saba, shudi mai sanyi), an cire zagayowar yanayi.
cap_threshold: Kwanaki kowace shekara sama da 18 °C (zafi) da kasa da 0 °C (daskarewa). Ketare yanayi biyu masu karfi na nufin yanzu kwanakin zafi sun fi na daskarewa yawa.
hint: Danna ko'ina ko latsa Esc don rufewa
intro: Yadda manyan biranen duniya suka dumama tun 1940: bayanan zafin yau da kullum daga sake nazarin yanayi na ERA5.
map_sub: Zabi birni a taswira ko daga jerin
omni_ph: Nemi birni, kasa, yanki ko kowane wuri
cap_range: Iyakar mafi kankanta-mafi girma na kowane wata cikin shekaru, tare da shekarar baya-bayan nan. Yana manne da gefen zafi?
record_title: Zafin yau da kullum na wata-wata mafi girma/kankanta na tarihi, {name}
cap_records: Zafin yau da kullum mafi girma da mafi kankanta na kowane wata a tarihi, tare da iyakokin shekarar baya-bayan nan
volatility_title: Sauye-sauyen zafi na kullum kowace shekara, {name}
cap_volatility: Sau nawa manyan tsalle-tsallen zafi na kullum ke faruwa kowace shekara (≥6 °C), bambancin zafi
cap_precip: Jimillar ruwan sama na shekara (ruwan sama da na kankara) tare da yanayi
cap_stripes: Kowane layi shine zafin shekara daya: shudi mai sanyi, ja ya fi zafi fiye da matsakaicin 1961-1990. Motsi daga shudi zuwa ja shine dumamar yanayi, babu abin karantawa sai launi.
cap_season: Tsawon lokacin noman zafi kowace shekara (jerin kwanaki masu matsakaicin yau da kullum ≥ 5 °C): lokacin da babu daskarewa da noma ya dogara da shi, yana tsawaita yayin da yanayi ke dumama.
dtr_ylabel: Matsakaicin sama − kasa na yau da kullum (°C)
cap_dtr: Matsakaicin gibin da ke tsakanin sama da kasa na kowace rana. Iyakar da ke raguwa alama ce ta iskar gida: dare na dumama da sauri fiye da rana; iyakar da ke fadada na iya nuna bushewa.
cap_seasonshift: Matsakaicin shekara na farko da na karshe na shekaru goma na tarihi. Gibin da ke tsakanin lankwasa a kowane wata yana nuna wadanne sassa na shekara suka fi dumama (sau da yawa lokacin sanyi fiye da lokacin zafi).
health_sub: Yadda yanayin dumamar yanayi na sama ke juyawa zuwa ma'aunan fuskantar zafi, sanyi da munanan abubuwa da aka amince da su. Kowane jadawali yana bayyana inda bayanan da yake bukata suke.
cap_degreedays: Nauyin jin dadin zafi na shekara: bukatar dumama (kasa da 18 °C) na raguwa yayin da bukatar sanyaya (sama da 22 °C) ke karuwa, wakilcin fuskantar sanyi da bukatar na'urar sanyaya iska.
cap_heatwave: Kwanaki cikin igiyar zafi: jerin kwanaki ≥3 da matakin sama na yau da kullum ya wuce kashi 90 na gida na 1961-1990. Zafin rana mai dorewa shine babban dalilin yawan mutuwa na igiyar zafi.
tropic_title: Darrurruwan wurare masu zafi kowace shekara, {name}
cap_tropic: Darare da matakin kasa ya kasance 20 °C ko sama, don haka jiki baya samun hutu na dare, babban dalili da ake yawan yin watsi da shi na mutuwa mai alaka da zafi.
cap_coldspell: Kwanaki cikin igiyar sanyi: jerin kwanaki ≥3 da matakin kasa na yau da kullum ya kasa kashi 10 na gida na 1961-1990. Sanyi mai dorewa yana haifar da yawan mutuwa na zuciya da numfashi a lokacin sanyi.
heavyrain_title: Kwanakin ruwan sama mai yawa kowace shekara, {name}
cap_heavyrain: Kwanaki masu akalla 20 mm na ruwan sama (ETCCDI R20mm), ruwan sama mai karfi da ke haifar da ambaliya wanda ke kawo rauni, gudun hijira da cututtukan da ke yaduwa ta ruwa.
heatindex_title: Kwanakin ma'aunin zafi masu hadari kowace shekara, {name}
cap_heatindex: Kwanaki da zafin da ake ji (ma'aunin zafi, wanda ya hada da danshi) ya kai matakan damuwar zafi, ma'aunin da gargadin zafi na jama'a ke amfani da shi. Yana bukatar bayanan zafin da ake ji.
footer: An kirkira {date} · bayanai daga Open-Meteo sake nazarin tarihi (ERA5) · tushen a GitHub
map_coverage: An yi nazarin birane {done} daga cikin {total} zuwa yanzu - sauran suna karuwa kowace rana.
qv_nodata: Babu bayanai ga wannan birni tukuna.
qv_nearest: Birni mafi kusa da aka yi nazari
cur_so_far: {year} zuwa yanzu (har {day} {month}): matsakaici {v} °C, {d} °C idan aka kwatanta da matsakaicin 1961-1990 na irin wadannan kwanaki na shekara.
cmp_hint: Kowace layi ita ce bambancin shekara-shekara na birnin daga matsakaicinsa na 1961-1990, don haka wurare masu yanayi daban-daban ana kwatanta su cikin adalci.
kpi_warmest: Shekarar da ta fi zafi (matsakaicin duniya)
sum_season: Lokacin da ke fi saurin dumama a nan: {season} ({v} °C a kowace shekara goma).
sum_month: Watan da ke fi saurin dumama a nan: {month} ({v} °C a kowace shekara goma).
grid_alias_note: Ana lissafta bayanan zafi ga kowace tantanin grid na bayanan yanayi mai kusan kilomita 11. {alias} da {city} suna cikin tantani ɗaya, don haka duka biyu suna nuna tarihi iri ɗaya tun 1940.
